title: Introduction to Mobile App Development & UI Fundamentals
description:
Objective

This week focuses on building a strong foundation in modern mobile application development. Interns will understand the mobile development ecosystem, project structure, development tools, responsive layouts, navigation, reusable UI components, and best coding practices while creating their first functional application.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Introduction to Mobile App Development
  • Development Environment Setup
  • Widgets & UI Components
  • Layouts and Navigation
  • Project Structure
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Installing Android Studio or VS Code with Flutter SDK
  • Understanding widgets, screens, routes and navigation
  • Responsive layouts using Rows, Columns, Stack and Flex
  • State management basics using StatefulWidget
  • Debugging and Hot Reload workflow
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Documentation – https://docs.flutter.dev
  • Flutter Complete Course (freeCodeCamp) – https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VPvVD8t02U8

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Personal Portfolio App UI

Create a multi-screen mobile application containing Splash Screen, Home Screen, About Screen and Contact Screen. Design reusable widgets, implement navigation between screens, apply responsive layouts and organize the project using clean folder structure.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Complete source code with organized folder structure.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will confidently set up a mobile development environment, build responsive user interfaces, navigate between screens, organize application architecture and understand the core workflow of professional mobile application development.

title: State Management, Forms & Local Storage
description:
Objective

This week introduces application state management, user input handling, validation techniques and local data persistence. Interns will build interactive applications capable of storing and managing user-generated information.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • State Management Basics
  • Forms and Validation
  • Local Storage
  • User Interaction
  • List Rendering
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Managing application state efficiently
  • TextFields, Controllers and Validation
  • Shared Preferences or Local Database basics
  • CRUD operations on local data
  • Dynamic lists with search functionality
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter State Management – https://docs.flutter.dev/data-and-backend/state-mgmt/intro
  • Flutter Forms Guide – https://docs.flutter.dev/cookbook/forms

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Notes Manager Application

Develop a Notes application where users can create, edit, delete and search notes. Validate all forms, persist data locally and build a clean responsive interface with reusable widgets.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Fully functional Notes application with CRUD features.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will understand state management fundamentals, create validated forms, implement local storage, manage dynamic data and build interactive applications using clean coding practices.

title: REST API Integration & Authentication
description:
Objective

This week focuses on integrating external APIs, handling asynchronous programming, implementing authentication workflows and improving application performance using networking best practices.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • REST API Integration
  • HTTP Requests
  • Authentication
  • JSON Parsing
  • Error Handling
2. Detailed Concepts
  • GET, POST, PUT and DELETE requests
  • Future, async and await
  • Loading indicators and exception handling
  • Login and registration flow
  • Secure token storage basics
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Networking – https://docs.flutter.dev/cookbook/networking
  • REST API Tutorial – https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1gDhl4leEzA

Practical Implementation

Project Task: News Reader Application

Integrate a public REST API to fetch news articles. Display categorized content, implement search, loading states, error handling and user authentication screens using mock login functionality.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Working application with API integration and authentication screens.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will gain practical experience consuming APIs, handling asynchronous programming, implementing authentication workflows and managing real-world application data.

title: Capstone Application, Testing & Deployment
description:
Objective

The final week combines everything learned throughout the internship into a complete production-ready mobile application. Interns will perform testing, optimize performance, prepare documentation and publish a demo build for evaluation.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Project Architecture
  • Testing and Debugging
  • Performance Optimization
  • App Build & Deployment
  • Documentation
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Code refactoring and reusable components
  • Testing critical application flows
  • Optimizing UI performance
  • Generating release APK
  • Professional GitHub documentation
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Deployment Guide – https://docs.flutter.dev/deployment/android
  • Flutter Testing – https://docs.flutter.dev/testing

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Complete Mobile Application Capstone

Develop a complete mobile application of your choice incorporating multiple screens, local storage, API integration, authentication, responsive UI, testing and deployment. Prepare the application for demonstration and evaluation.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Release APK, project presentation and complete source code.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will be capable of independently designing, developing, testing, documenting and presenting a professional mobile application suitable for inclusion in a technical portfolio.
